name: Chipits Black Forest Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter with the brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat until well combined.
3. Stir in the flour, granola cereal, coconut, chopped cherries, nuts, baking powder, and orange rind (if using).
4. Fold in the chocolate chips.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool on the baking sheet.
